uiBuilder.label: Metric Card
uiBuilder.description: A configurable KPI card: icon, heading, formatted value, and a trend pill (e.g. ↓ 4.2% MoM).

properties.name: iconGlyph
properties.label: Icon glyph
properties.description: A literal glyph for the icon tile (text or emoji, e.g. $ or 📈). Always renders. Takes precedence over Icon. Leave empty to use a now-icon, or to hide the tile.

properties.name: icon
properties.label: Icon (now-icon)
properties.description: now-icon glyph name (e.g. currency-dollar-outline, chart-line-outline). Used only when Icon glyph is empty. Resolves from the instance icon library, so may render blank in a disconnected local preview.

properties.name: value
properties.label: Value
properties.description: The headline metric. A number or numeric string; formatted per the Value format property.

properties.name: decimals
properties.label: Decimal places
properties.description: Decimal places for the value and trend magnitude.

properties.name: currencySymbol
properties.label: Currency symbol
properties.description: Prefix used when Value format is Currency.

properties.name: trendValue
properties.label: Trend value
properties.description: Change vs the previous period. The sign sets the arrow direction (auto); the magnitude is shown. Leave empty to hide the trend pill.

properties.name: trendDirection
properties.label: Trend direction
properties.description: Arrow direction. Auto derives it from the sign of the trend value.

properties.name: trendPeriod
properties.label: Trend period
properties.description: Caption beside the pill, e.g. MoM, YoY, vs last week.

properties.name: trendPositiveIsGood
properties.label: Increase is positive
properties.description: When on, an upward trend is green and downward is red. Turn off for lower-is-better metrics (cost, churn, latency).

properties.name: iconColor
properties.label: Icon color
properties.description: Optional CSS color for the icon glyph. Empty uses the theme default.

properties.name: iconBackgroundColor
properties.label: Icon background color
properties.description: Optional CSS color for the icon tile background. Empty uses the theme default.

properties.name: clickable
properties.label: Clickable
properties.description: When on, the card is focusable and emits a 'Metric card clicked' event.

events.name: METRIC_CARD_CLICKED
events.label: Metric card clicked
events.description: Fired when a clickable card is activated by click or keyboard. Payload: { heading, value }.
